summary: Diff adds a full TanStack Router + React Query frontend with public and authenticated management areas, plus a single Motoko backend actor that defines models for students, attendance, fees, monthly tests, and exams and enforces an authorization layer. Several requirements appear implemented at a UI/routing level (public layout with contact info + Instagram link; /manage routes gated by RequireAuth; navigation; loading/error states; non-blue primary theme). However, the backend diff is truncated, so persistence and some API/AC specifics cannot be confirmed from the provided evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Student profile records persist across page reloads.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo shows in-memory Map-based storage declarations, but the diff excerpt does not show any stable variables, persistence mechanism, or upgrade hooks to persist student records across canister upgrades/reloads.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend prevents duplicate attendance entries for the same student+date (update instead of creating another).
missing_requirements.reason: Attendance model and Map storage are shown, but the provided excerpt does not show recordAttendance/updateAttendance logic enforcing uniqueness by (studentId, date).

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend can return total amount collected within a date range for fees.
missing_requirements.reason: Fee model and feeRecords storage are shown, but the excerpt does not show any API that computes/returns totals over a date range.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add generated static images under frontend/public/assets/generated (crest, homepage hero, favicon) and render them in the UI without backend image serving.
missing_requirements.reason: UI references /assets/generated/school-crest.dim_512x512.png, but the diff summary does not show the required generated image files being added under frontend/public/assets/generated, nor evidence of the hero image or favicon being present/used (files may be in omitted additions, but not verifiable from provided diff).
evidence: (No shown additions under frontend/public/assets/generated in diff summary)

hallucinated_features.description: Custom authorization/access-control system with secret admin token initialization via URL parameter (caffeineAdminToken) and permission checks in backend.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest specifies only Internet Identity for authentication and does not request an additional secret-token-based admin initialization mechanism or role/permission system.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile capture/setup flow (ProfileSetupDialog) and user profile APIs (save/get profiles).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested in requirements; the BuildRequest focuses on admissions/attendance/fees/tests/exams modules and II-gated access, but not collecting/storing staff user profiles.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer attribution/link to caffeine.ai and decorative heart element.
